query: SELECT DISTINCT fi.nomeLoja FROM fichas_identificadas_analise fi WHERE fi.analiseId = 810001 AND fi.nomeLoja IN (SELECT l.nome FROM lojas l INNER JOIN gestor_lojas gl ON l.id = gl.lojaId INNER JOIN gestores g ON gl.gestorId = g.id INNER JOIN users u ON g.userId = u.id WHERE u.name = 'Marco Amorim') ORDER BY fi.nomeLoja;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2rEtBRZHWZUfGJS.3b07a01772f8 --database 3c9MozLH35e233uWy5WDtH --execute SELECT DISTINCT fi.nomeLoja FROM fichas_identificadas_analise fi WHERE fi.analiseId = 810001 AND fi.nomeLoja IN (SELECT l.nome FROM lojas l INNER JOIN gestor_lojas gl ON l.id = gl.lojaId INNER JOIN gestores g ON gl.gestorId = g.id INNER JOIN users u ON g.userId = u.id WHERE u.name = 'Marco Amorim') ORDER BY fi.nomeLoja;
